data_strings2.s.gMultiText_LinkError: {HIGHLIGHT TRANSPARENT}{COLOR WHITE2}Link error...\nCheck your Game Link cable connection,\nand turn the power off and on.
data_strings2.s.gSystemText_LoadEventPressA: Press the A Button to load event.\n... ... B Button: Cancel
data_strings2.s.gSystemText_DontCutLink: Don't remove the Game Link cable.\nDon't turn off the power.
data_strings2.s.TradeText_PressBToExit: Press the B Button to exit.
data_strings2.s.TradeText_TradeCancelled: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}The trade has\nbeen canceled.
data_strings2.s.TradeText_OnlyPoke: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}That's your only\nPOKéMON for battle.
data_strings2.s.TradeText_NonTradablePoke: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}Your friend can't\ntrade that one.
data_strings2.s.TradeText_WaitingForFriend: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}Waiting for your\nfriend to finish...
data_strings2.s.TradeText_WantToTrade: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}Your friend wants\nto trade POKéMON.$
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_MixingComplete: Record mixing completed.\nThank you for waiting.
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_OutOfCoins: You've run out of COINS.\nGame over!
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_ReelTime:
REEL TIME
Here's your chance to take
aim and nail marks!
The Reel Time continues for
as often as the drawn number.
It all ends on a Big Bonus.
data_strings2.s.DaycareText_GetAlongVeryWell: The two seem to get along very well.
data_strings2.s.DaycareText_GetAlong: The two seem to get along.
data_strings2.s.DaycareText_DontLikeOther: The two don't seem to like each other.
data_strings2.s.DaycareText_PlayOther: The two prefer to play with other\nPOKéMON than each other.
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_HatchedFromEgg: {COLOR WHITE2}{HIGHLIGHT TRANSPARENT}{SHADOW DARK_GREY}{STR_VAR_1} hatched from the EGG!
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_NickHatchPrompt: {COLOR WHITE2}{HIGHLIGHT TRANSPARENT}{SHADOW DARK_GREY}Would you like to nickname the newly\nhatched {STR_VAR_1}?
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_DeleteOlderMove:
{STR_VAR_1} is trying to learn
{STR_VAR_2}.\pBut {STR_VAR_1} can't learn more
than four moves.\pDelete an older move to make
room for {STR_VAR_2}?
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_GiveUpTeachingMove: Give up trying to teach a new move\nto {STR_VAR_1}?
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_EggDayCare: An odd POKéMON EGG found\nby the DAY CARE couple.
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_EggNicePlace: A peculiar POKéMON EGG\nobtained at the nice place.
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_EggObtainedInTrade: A peculiar POKéMON EGG\nobtained in a trade.
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_EggHotSprings: A POKéMON EGG obtained\nat the hot springs.
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_DiplomaCertificationGameFreak:
{HIGHLIGHT TRANSPARENT}Player: {CLEAR 0x10}{COLOR RED}{PLAYER}

{COLOR DARK_GREY}{STR_VAR_1} POKéDEX
This document certifies
that you have successfully
completed your POKéDEX.

data_strings2.s.gOtherText_LinkNotFound: Link partner(s) not found.\nPlease try again.\p
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_BlenderChooseBerry: Starting up the BERRY BLENDER.\pPlease select a BERRY from your BAG\nto put in the BERRY BLENDER.\p
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_PressAToStart: Press the A Button to start.
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_BlendAnotherBerryPrompt: Would you like to blend another BERRY?
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_OutOfBerries: You've run out of BERRIES for\nblending in the BERRY BLENDER.\p
data_strings2.s.gOtherText_NoBerriesForBlend: has no BERRIES to put in\nthe BERRY BLENDER.
